sections.nrsv: Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of heaven.
sections.lamsa: Blessed are the poor in spirit, for the kingdom of heaven is theirs.
sections.hart: How blessed are those who know their need of God; the kingdom of Heaven is theirs.
sections.commentary:
• Spirit here refers to humility and openness to God.
  • Esoteric: The 'poor' are those who have emptied themselves of ego.

sections.nrsv: Blessed are those who mourn, for they will be comforted.
sections.lamsa: Blessed are those who mourn, for they shall be comforted.
sections.hart: How blessed are the sorrowful; they shall find consolation.
sections.commentary: Mourning is not just grief, but deep spiritual longing. Esoteric: Mourning for the world’s suffering brings divine comfort.

sections.nrsv: Blessed are the meek, for they will inherit the earth.
sections.lamsa: Blessed are the meek, for they shall inherit the earth.
sections.hart: How blessed are the gentle; they shall have the earth for their possession.
sections.commentary: Meek means strength under control. Esoteric: The gentle inherit the earth by being in harmony with it.
